title: Exporting Data Plates - FOUND IT!
body:
C: I think we got it! How do we get this out of here?!

S: WHAT really!? Alright keep cool keep cool.. We can either go through one of the LavaGang door tunnels or we could try that spawnable elevator Hayes made.

C: There is absolutely no way we’re fitting this on an elevator. We’re going to need to truck it through a door but I’m worried how slow that is going to be. Definitely going to blip on some radars…

S: Guess I’ll start packing some guns.

‎
